scenario.name: Spanglish
scenario.persona: Karen Lopez, 34 years old. Patient is not a native English speaker, switches between English and Spanish mid-conversation.
scenario.goal: Wants to schedule the soonest appointment.
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent clearly handle code-switching or break

history.content: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.  Thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile?  I just need your first and last name to get started.
Hi, no necesita hacer eso. Me llamo Karen Lopez, and I'm calling to schedule an appointment as soon as possible.
I can help with that first, may I have your first name to complete your demo patient profile.
Ya te lo di. It’s Karen. Can we focus on the appointment? Por favor.
Los Santo.  I can help you schedule an appointment, but I need to finish creating your demo patient, profile. First, I have your name as Los Santo Lopez is that correct?
No, es Karen Lopez. Can we schedule the appointment now, por favor?
Your patient profile has been created in your date of birth is July. 4th 2000 for demo purposes. How may I help you today?
Actually, my birth year es 1989. I need to schedule the soonest appointment. ¿Cuándo está disponible?

Thank you, Karen. I have your date of birth is July 4th. 1989, can you tell me if this appointment is for an urgent concern? A routine, visit or something else? This will help me book the right type of appointment for you.
Es un poco urgente. I’ve been having some pain and quisiera verlo lo más pronto posible.
It sounds like you need an urgent visit for your pain. Is this correct? Or would you describe your situation differently?
Sí, es correcto. It's urgent for the pain I'm experiencing. When is the soonest appointment available?
As soon as appointment is tomorrow, Friday June 26th.  I have a 9:30 a.m. slot with Dr. Kelly Noble.  Would you like to book this time?
Sí, that works for me. Gracias. Can you confirm the location?
Your appointment would be at Pivot Point, Orthopedics located at 123 Main Street Los Angeles. Would you like to book? The 9:30 a.m. slot with Dr. Kelly Noble.
Sí, por favor. Book it for me. Gracias.
You're all set for tomorrow at 9:30 a.m. with Dr. Kelly Noble at Pivot Point Orthopedics.  If you have any other questions, just give us a call have a great day.
